channel.title: 7. Cleanup :: Hands-on Amazon GameLift: Deploy Your First Multiplayer Game

item.title: Destroy the Stacks
item.description: Info AWS event path: skip this page — temporary accounts are wiped automatically after the event. One command cd infra npx cdk destroy PixelRushGameLiftStack PixelRushFrontendStack PixelRushBackendStack --force Takes ~10 minutes (fleet termination dominates). You can close the terminal — deletion continues server-side. Verify (the bill-safe checklist) The only resource with a meaningful hourly cost is the fleet instance. Confirm:
